repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.graphics: GLSL vertex and fragment shaders, the rasterization pipeline, model-view-projection transforms, texture sampling and framebuffers, Vulkan render passes and frame timing
optimize a CPU JSON parser hot loop and add a microbenchmark

retrieval_query: rendering pipeline rasterization vertex shader fragment shader glsl hlsl wgsl model view projection matrix texture sampler framebuffer render target depth blend opengl vulkan webgpu frame timing

validation_smoke.name: code.graphics L3 validation smoke
signals: shader compiles clean under the validation/SPIR-V layer
rendered output matches a reference image within tolerance
GPU validation layer (Vulkan/WebGPU) reports no errors
depth/blend state produces correct occlusion and transparency
frame time stays within the target budget on the GPU timeline

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.graphics diagnosis smoke
signals: geometry transformed in the wrong coordinate space (object vs world vs clip)
reading an attachment while still writing it without a barrier (resource hazard)
non-power-of-two or mismatched texture format causing sampling artifacts
alpha blending order producing wrong transparency
validation layer error ignored because the image still looks plausible
